name: Bridge Rush – Draw Bridge Puzzle Game
description: Draw a stable road, launch the car, and reach the finish! Bridge Rush is a physics-based puzzle game where you must sketch bridges using limited ink to help your car reach the goal. Plan carefully, optimize your bridge, and earn up to 3 stars across 50 challenging levels. Features: • Draw bridges with limited ink • Realistic car physics • 50 challenging levels • Star rating system • Smooth mobile controls
instructions: bull Drag mouse or finger to draw the bridge bull Tap Launch to start the car bull Reach the finish with minimum ink
